title: Unarmed Skeleton
description: A neoforge 1.21.1 mod that adds unarmed skeletons!
body:
A simple mod that adds Unarmed Skeletons to the spawn pool.

Unarmed skeletons attack like zombies but run much faster and have equal health to regular ranged skeletons. They drop bones 100% of the time. 

I make small, simple mods with minimal additions for players to add to their modpacks. If you find bugs, please DM me on Discord at buggybuggy._.

Custom skin by: [https://www.planetminecraft.com/mob-skin/skeleton-redone/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/mob-skin/skeleton-redone/)
